title: Add favicon logo for website tab

requirements.text: Generate a favicon logo that represents renewable energy themes (such as sun, wind, water, or leaf elements) suitable for display in browser tabs

quotes: can you add a logo for the website tab

acceptanceCriteria: Favicon image is generated with appropriate dimensions for browser display
Design visually represents renewable energy concepts
Image works well at small sizes (16x16, 32x32 pixels)

requirements.text: Update frontend/index.html to reference the generated favicon file in the <head> section with proper link tags for different sizes

quotes: can you add a logo for the website tab

acceptanceCriteria: Link tag with rel='icon' points to the generated favicon
Favicon displays correctly in browser tabs
Favicon is visible when page is bookmarked

nonGoals: Changing the site name or branding
Adding logos to other parts of the site beyond the browser tab

required: Clean, simple renewable energy icon with sun rays, wind turbine blade, or leaf symbol in green and yellow tones suitable for favicon display (favicon.dim_32x32.png)
